---
name: Bug Report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## 🔁 Steps to Reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 🎯 Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## 😔 Actual Behavior

What actually happened (include error messages, screenshots if applicable).

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## 💻 Environment

Please complete the following information:

- **OS**: [e.g., Windows 10, macOS 12.5, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Python Version**: [e.g., Python 3.11.4]
- **Package Version**: [e.g., 0.1.0]
- **Download Mode**: [Git / ZIP]
- **Configuration**: [Attach config.yaml if relevant]

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

- [ ] I have checked existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I'm using the latest version of the software
- [ ] I can reproduce this issue consistently

## 🔗 Related Issues

Link any related issues here (if applicable).
